Market Intelligence Brief
Generated 12:02 ET
Index put protection surges while single-name call positioning builds despite CPI uncertainty
KEY TAKEAWAYS
  • 1. Extreme P/C divergence signals institutional dispersion strategy — index puts (1.77) hedge concentrated single-name call exposure (0.86).
  • 2. Semiconductor complex shows conflicting signals with massive AMD call blocks against technical breakouts but elevated near-term fear priced in.
  • 3. Pre-CPI positive gamma environment ($9.2B SPY) should contain volatility, but low implied correlation creates single-name breakout potential.
NARRATIVE — dispersion hedge pre-CPI

The most striking development is the extreme P/C divergence between index puts (1.77) and single-name calls (0.86) — the widest split in recent sessions and a textbook institutional dispersion hedge ahead of CPI. This positioning suggests large managers are protecting broad exposure while maintaining conviction in individual names, amplified by implied correlation at just 0.09 indicating stock-specific opportunities over index moves. Semiconductor positioning reveals sophisticated cross-currents despite the sector's technical strength. AMD's massive 20,000-contract June 210C block at $38.88 aligns with its 81.5 technical score and golden cross, yet the stock trades in backwardation with elevated near-term fear priced in. MRVL shows similar dynamics with 5,000 June 150C blocks supporting its 88.7 technical score, while both names benefit from Millennium's aggressive Q4 positioning reversals in the complex. The positive gamma regime ($9.2B SPY GEX) should theoretically dampen pre-CPI volatility, but eight names trading in backwardation suggest event-specific fear is concentrated in individual stories rather than broad market hedging. This setup favors dispersion trades — particularly given WMT and PEP showing rich vol/call heavy divergences that historically resolve through vol compression rather than spot moves.

Layer 1: P/C divergence 1.77/0.86Layer 2: Positive GEX $9.2BLayer 3: AMD 20k call blockLayer 4: 8 names backwardationLayer 9: CPI today
